storageName.title: Storage Name
storageName.description: The name of the storage used by the browser storage drive (e.g. for IndexedDB). Changing this value requires a page reload to take effect.

additionalFileTypes.title: Additional File Types
additionalFileTypes.description:
Additional file types to register with the browser storage drive.
Each entry must have a 'name', 'extensions' (array of file extensions like '.py'), 'fileFormat' ('text', 'json', or 'base64'), and optionally 'mimeTypes' (array of MIME types).

The extension includes built-in defaults for common file types. Use this setting to add file types that are not covered by the defaults.

Example:
[
  {
    "name": "custom-config",
    "extensions": [".myconfig"],
    "mimeTypes": ["text/plain"],
    "fileFormat": "text"
  }
]

name.description: The name of the file type.

mimeTypes.description: The MIME types associated with this file type.

toolbar.title: Browser Storage drive toolbar items
